steps.title: Identify the example
steps.content: The first sentence gives a general claim: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulkier ones. The Airbus nose then illustrates that claim before the semi-truck provides a contrast.

steps.title: Choose the illustrative transition
steps.content: A suggests simultaneous comparison, B signals contrast, and C adds another point. The blank introduces a specific case of a sleek vehicle gliding through wind, so the example transition fits. The answer is D.
